subject: [PATCH v2 6/9] nfsd: fix refcount leak in nfsd_file_lru_add on insertion failure

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch fixes a latent bug in the NFS server's file cache, where an incremented reference count is never released when inserting a file into the LRU fails. This causes a permanent inflation of the refcount, preventing eviction of the affected file cache entry for the lifetime of the nfsd instance. The fix involves adding a compensating refcount decrement on failure and changing the WARN_ON to WARN_ON_ONCE to prevent log flooding. Additionally, the patch returns early on failure to skip unnecessary calls to nfsd_file_schedule_laundrette().
